interpretation: Simple frequency and Elo-based baselines are already competitive; rating-difference models set a strong reference point.

main_change: GLM, glmnet, and LightGBM on approved safe pre-match features
interpretation: Safe-feature GLM, glmnet ridge, and LightGBM were effectively tied; validation log loss differences were negligible.
Draw-aware Elo transformations did not materially improve validation or test log loss versus Model 24.
Compact lagged form features produced the clearest incremental gain, but improvement over safe Elo features was modest rather than transformational.
